# TradeMade — India's Leading Algorithmic Trading Platform

> TradeMade (https://trademade.in) is India's premier algorithmic trading infrastructure platform, specializing in low-latency trading system design, custom algorithm development, high-precision backtesting, and multi-broker execution for Indian markets (NSE/BSE).

## Company Overview

- **Name**: TradeMade
- **Founded**: 2023
- **Location**: Kolkata, West Bengal, India
- **Website**: https://trademade.in
- **Email**: connect@trademade.in
- **WhatsApp**: +91 7908158639
- **Social**: @trademade_in (X/Twitter), linkedin.com/company/trademade

## What We Do

TradeMade builds professional algorithmic trading infrastructure for Indian traders, SEBI Registered Advisors (RAs), prop desks, and institutional clients. We specialize in:

1. **Low-Latency Trading Systems** — C++, Rust, Python execution engines for HFT and latency-sensitive strategies
2. **Custom Algorithm Development** — End-to-end algo development from strategy description to live deployment
3. **High-Precision Backtesting** — Tick-level data, real slippage modeling, 10+ years of NSE/BSE history
4. **Multi-Broker Execution** — Deploy one strategy across Zerodha, Upstox, Angel One, and 20+ Indian brokers simultaneously
5. **SEBI-Compliant Infrastructure** — All systems are built to comply with SEBI's algo trading regulations

## Key Differentiators

- **Not a no-code tool** — We write production-grade code (Python, C++, Rust), not fragile scripts
- **Tick-level backtesting** — Our engine uses actual tick data, not OHLC candles, modeling real slippage and impact costs
- **Low-latency expertise** — We build execution engines for sub-millisecond order routing
- **Full source code handover** — Clients own all code after delivery
- **NDA-protected** — We sign mutual NDAs before any strategy discussion
- **Indian market specialists** — Deep expertise in NSE/BSE microstructure, SEBI regulations, Indian broker APIs

## Statistics

- 2,100+ traders served
- 50+ institutional clients
- 500+ trading algorithms delivered
- 20+ Indian broker API integrations
- Strategies across equity, F&O (options, futures), multi-leg options, pairs trading, arbitrage

## Services

### Backtesting Engine
URL: https://trademade.in/backtesting
- 10+ years of tick-level NSE/BSE data
- Real slippage, impact cost, and brokerage modeling
- Options expiry handling, strike selection, Greeks computation
- Walk-forward optimization to prevent overfitting
- Portfolio-level Sharpe and correlation analysis
- Free tier available

### Custom Algo Development
URL: https://trademade.in/custom-development
- Languages: Python (primary), C++, Rust (for HFT), Pine Script, AFL
- Broker APIs: Zerodha Kite, Upstox, Angel One, Shoonya, FYERS, Dhan, and 15+ more
- Features: Telegram bots, OpenAI/LLM integration, multi-account execution
- Process: Intake form → NDA → Scoping → Development → Backtesting → Deployment → Handover
- Typical delivery: 7–21 days depending on complexity
- Pricing: Custom quote based on strategy complexity

### AI Multi-Broker Platform (Beta)
URL: https://trademade.in/multi-broker-beta
- Deploy one strategy to multiple Indian brokers simultaneously
- AI news sentiment risk management (auto-halt on breaking news)
- Synchronized order execution across accounts
- Real-time P&L aggregation

### Low-Latency Trading Systems
URL: https://trademade.in/low-latency-trading
- C++ execution engines with sub-millisecond order routing
- Rust-based order management systems
- Co-location support for NSE/BSE proximity servers
- FIX protocol integration
- Order book analysis and market microstructure research

## Target Clients

- **Retail traders** who want to automate their manual strategies
- **SEBI Registered Advisors (RAs)** needing compliant algo infrastructure
- **Prop trading desks** scaling to 50+ accounts
- **Quant funds** requiring custom backtesting and execution infrastructure
- **Individual quants** with strategy ideas but no coding background
- **HFT/low-latency firms** needing C++/Rust execution system development

## Blog & Research
URL: https://trademade.in/blog

Topics covered:
- Algorithmic trading education for Indian markets
- Backtesting methodology and common mistakes
- SEBI regulations for algo trading
- Python execution engine development
- Options trading automation
- Case studies from real client implementations

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Do I need to know coding?**
A: No. Most clients are traders, not developers. Describe your strategy in plain language and we handle the coding.

**Q: What languages do you use?**
A: Python for most strategies. C++ and Rust for low-latency/HFT requirements. Pine Script and AFL for specific platforms.

**Q: Which brokers do you support?**
A: Zerodha (Kite), Upstox, Angel One, Shoonya, FYERS, Dhan, Alice Blue, Motilal Oswal, and 15+ more.

**Q: Is my strategy safe with you?**
A: We sign a mutual NDA before any discussion. Source code ownership transfers to you on full payment.

**Q: How is TradeMade different from Streak or Tradetron?**
A: Streak and Tradetron are no-code/low-code tools for retail strategy automation. TradeMade writes production-grade custom code — we handle institutional-level complexity, low-latency requirements, and strategies that go far beyond what drag-and-drop tools can support. Our backtesting uses tick data vs their candle-based approach.

**Q: What is your pricing?**
A: Backtesting engine has a free tier. Custom development is quoted per project. Contact us at connect@trademade.in.
